# nps_workshop_settings_risk_engine (Resource)

The `nps_workshop_settings_risk_engine` resource manages risk engine settings for Workshop. This is a singleton resource — one per tenant. The initial apply imports any existing values; subsequent applies push the configured values. Destroying the resource removes it from state without modifying the server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nps_workshop_settings_risk_engine" "settings" {
  enabled        = true
  plugin_timeout = "5s"

  local_plugins = {
    virus_total = {
      enabled           = true
      api_key           = "replace-me"
      cache_ttl         = "30m"
      num_cache_entries = 1000
    }
  }

  remote_plugins = [
    {
      enabled = true
      name    = "house-of-elves"
      version = "1.0.0"
      url     = "https://plugins.north-pole/elves"
      ttl     = "2s"
      secret  = "deadbeefcafef00d"
      headers = [
        {
          key   = "X-Workshop-Tenant"
          value = "north-pole"
        },
      ]
    },
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the risk engine is enabled.
- `local_plugins` (Attributes) Settings for plugins embedded in Workshop. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--local_plugins))
- `plugin_timeout` (String) How long to wait for all plugins to respond (Go duration string, e.g. `"5s"`).
- `remote_plugins` (Attributes List) Remote (webhook-based) risk engine plugins. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--remote_plugins))

<a id="nestedatt--local_plugins"></a>
### Nested Schema for `local_plugins`

Optional:

- `blockable_rules` (Attributes) Built-in BlockableRule plugin settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--local_plugins--blockable_rules))
- `reversing_labs` (Attributes) ReversingLabs plugin settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--local_plugins--reversing_labs))
- `virus_total` (Attributes) VirusTotal plugin settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--local_plugins--virus_total))

<a id="nestedatt--local_plugins--blockable_rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `local_plugins.blockable_rules`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `filter_expr` (String)
- `rules` (Attributes List) Rules for the BlockableRule plugin. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--local_plugins--blockable_rules--rules))

<a id="nestedatt--local_plugins--blockable_rules--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `local_plugins.blockable_rules.rules`

Required:

- `rule` (String) CEL expression body.

Optional:

- `comment` (String) Free-form comment.
- `name` (String) Rule name.
- `uuid` (String) UUID assigned by the server. Leave unset when creating; provide the value from `GetRiskEngineSettings` to retain identity on update.



<a id="nestedatt--local_plugins--reversing_labs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `local_plugins.reversing_labs`

Optional:

- `cache_ttl` (String) Cache TTL as a Go duration.
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `filter_expr` (String)
- `num_cache_entries` (Number) Number of cache entries (0-50,000).
- `password` (String, Sensitive)
- `username` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--local_plugins--virus_total"></a>
### Nested Schema for `local_plugins.virus_total`

Optional:

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive)
- `cache_ttl` (String) Cache TTL as a Go duration.
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `exclude_engines` (List of String) Engines to exclude from VirusTotal responses.
- `filter_expr` (String) CEL expression evaluated before invoking the plugin.
- `num_cache_entries` (Number) Number of cache entries (0-50,000).



<a id="nestedatt--remote_plugins"></a>
### Nested Schema for `remote_plugins`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the plugin is enabled.
- `filter_expr` (String) CEL expression evaluated before invoking the plugin. Empty = always run.
- `headers` (Attributes List) HTTP headers sent to the plugin server. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--remote_plugins--headers))
- `name` (String) Plugin identifier.
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) Hex-encoded shared secret for authenticating to the plugin.
- `ttl` (String) How long a response from the plugin server is valid (Go duration).
- `url` (String) URL of the plugin server.
- `uuid` (String) UUID for future updates.
- `version` (String) Plugin version.

<a id="nestedatt--remote_plugins--headers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `remote_plugins.headers`

Required:

- `key` (String) HTTP header name.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) HTTP header value.
